name: slidex
description: Codex plugin front door for slidex deck creation and HTML/PDF document workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Create slidex decks through a required local React Wizard.
interface.longDescription: slidex starts a loopback React Wizard workbench from Codex for every new deck, returns a local workbench URL without automatic browser navigation by default, captures enough deck intake to proceed, and keeps the CLI as the source of truth for HTML/PDF render, QA, and package stages. Plugin startup checks and applies verified production/canary release updates before the wizard is used, and the CLI embeds the default deck template so installed binaries can bootstrap new workbenches without a workspace-local template folder.
defaultPrompt: Start a new slidex deck, seed the React wizard, and return the local workbench URL.
Create deck <deck_id>, return the React wizard URL, and generate after I complete it.
Run the slidex delivery workflow for an existing deck and verify render, QA, and package gates.
